source: 19-page trial PDF conversion spec created during project
notes: This is a compact machine-readable version of the page-by-page spec. See docs/05_PAGE_CONVERSION_RULES.md for full rules.

high_priority_visual_pages.handling: recreate as SVG or crop; required
show line segments; drawing/line input required

special_layout_example.handling: normalize into suffix headings and base-word list unless wheel layout is pedagogically required
